name: Bixby Table Lamp - 26.5 Inch Height - TBL4265 - Brass - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the stylish Bixby glass table lamp. Standing at 26.5 inches, this lamp offers a sleek and modern design that seamlessly complements any decor. The white glass body is beautifully contrasted by a brass finish, creating a striking yet elegant look. Made with a composition of 40 percent acrylic for a sleek finish and 60 percent iron for sturdy support, Bixby combines artistry with functional use.

Perfect for a living room, bedroom, or office, this lamp not only provides great lighting but also serves as a stunning decorative piece. Its inviting glow and sophisticated presence set the mood for any occasion. Revamp your home ambiance effortlessly with the Bixby table lamp?where style meets function.
